prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic street photograph on a rainy overcast day in a quiet Japanese residential neighborhood. A teenage Japanese schoolgirl walks on the left side of the frame holding a transparent plastic umbrella, wearing a classic navy-and-white sailor school uniform with a white short-sleeve blouse, navy collar and neckerchief, navy pleated skirt, white socks, and black loafers, carrying a black school bag on her shoulder. Her face is softly anonymized/blurred. The wet asphalt road fills most of the image, reflecting walls, poles, and the gray sky, with visible ripples from rain. In the foreground-right, an absurd surreal detail: a single bald human head protrudes from a large puddle in the road as if rising from beneath the water, also with the face anonymized/blurred, surrounded by circular ripples. Background includes a gray concrete block wall along the left, a utility pole with black-and-yellow protective stripes, a narrow side street, low residential buildings, and a red triangular stop/yield sign plus a blue no-parking sign in the distance. Mood: eerie, quiet, darkly humorous, documentary snapshot realism. Use natural muted colors, damp textures, shallow-to-medium depth of field, 1:1 square composition, eye-level perspective, realistic rain reflections, no added text, no watermark.
